# XCUIElementAttributes

**Protocol**

Attributes exposed by UI elements.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor protocol XCUIElementAttributes
```

## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIElementAttributes] protocol adds attribute-related functionality to the [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIElement] class. Access these properties on an instance of [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIElement] to query the current state of the UI element’s attributes.



## Identity

- **identifier**: The element’s accessibility identifier.
- **elementType**: The type of the element.
- **XCUIElement.ElementType**: The types of UI elements that you find, inspect, and interact with in a UI test.

## Value

- **value**: The raw value attribute of the element.
- **placeholderValue**: The value displayed when the element has no value.
- **title**: The title attribute of the element.
- **label**: The label attribute of the element.

## Interaction state

- **hasFocus**: The property that determines whether the element has UI focus.
- **isEnabled**: Whether or not the element is enabled for user interaction.
- **isSelected**: The property that determines whether the element is selected.

## Size

- **frame**: The frame of the element in the screen’s coordinate space.
- **horizontalSizeClass**: The horizontal size class of the element.
- **verticalSizeClass**: The vertical size class of the element.
- **XCUIElement.SizeClass**: The user interface size classes you can inspect in a UI test.

## UI elements

- **XCUIElement**: A UI element in an application.
- **XCUIElementSnapshot**: A set of attributes to express a snapshot of an element’s attributes and descendant user interface hierarchy.
- **XCUIElementSnapshotProviding**: A method to capture a snapshot of an element’s attributes and descendant user interface hierarchy.
- **XCUICoordinate**: A location on screen relative to a UI element.

## Inherited By

- XCUIElementSnapshot

## Conforming Types

- XCUIApplication
- XCUIElement
